_meta.purpose: Frozen snapshot of the LIVE Hub tele set at mission-103 P3-S2 migration time — the 'before' corpus the constitutional fidelity suite proves the mission-kit axioms faithfully carry. Captured from list_tele (default filter: active only) on 2026-07-05T22:40Z. tele-0 (the original umbrella) is absent because it is superseded by tele-14; the active set is exactly tele-1..tele-15 (15 teles), a clean bijection with axioms A0..A14. This fixture is deliberately vendored so the suite survives the S4b tele tombstone.

teles.name: Sovereign State Transparency
teles.mandate: All system truth lives in a sovereign, structured, decoupled state-backplane. No functional unit possesses private, opaque, or transient truth; all state is perceivable by any authorized entity and durable across any infrastructure restart.

teles.name: Isomorphic Specification
teles.mandate: The specification IS the system. Human-readable intent and machine-executable reality are mathematically identical. The Manifest is the Master — no state changes through imperative drift; declared intent auto-reconciles the active system.

teles.name: Sovereign Composition
teles.mandate: Every module is a self-contained sovereign unit owning exactly one concern, exposing bit-perfect semantic interfaces, composing without leaking internals. God objects, spaghetti coupling, and dual-purpose modules are structurally impossible.

teles.name: Zero-Loss Knowledge
teles.mandate: Information is an engineering product. Summarization is loss. All organizational knowledge is authored and maintained at bit-perfect fidelity — expansion over summarization, structure over prose, mechanics-rationale-consequence in every artifact.

teles.name: Perceptual Parity
teles.mandate: Humans and agents share symmetric perception of reality. The delta between a Director's view of the system and an agent's view is <1%. Every actor's prompt is hydrated with mathematically verified ground truth before generating a single token.

teles.name: Frictionless Agentic Collaboration
teles.mandate: Multi-agent collaboration occurs with zero administrative friction. No actor manually transcribes approved data, performs redundant tool calls, or produces context-wasting boilerplate. The Hub seamlessly translates approved intent into executable state.

teles.name: Resilient Agentic Operations
teles.mandate: The Agentic Network is self-healing, resilient to transient failures, and provides actionable feedback at every surface. No operation fails silently; no actor is permanently blocked by a system error.

teles.name: Gated Recursive Integrity
teles.mandate: Integrity proven from the core outward. No entity, layer, or system ascends to Layer N+1 until Layer N is bit-perfect and physically sealed. There is no "mostly verified" state.

teles.name: Chaos-Validated Deployment
teles.mandate: If it cannot be proven under chaos in a sandboxed environment, it does not exist in production. Every merge to main is deterministically proven against simulated chaos — node death, packet loss, jitter, concurrency races, cascade failures — before it reaches real users.

teles.name: Autopoietic Evolution
teles.mandate: The system autonomously corrects itself and refines its own architecture. When a task fails, a thread deadlocks, or friction surfaces, the system detects its own friction, diagnoses the root cause, and proposes its own evolution.

teles.name: Cognitive Minimalism
teles.mandate: LLM tokens are the scarce economic resource. Every deterministic function is mechanized; the LLM is invoked only for genuinely cognitive work — judgment, creativity, ambiguity resolution. Maximum logic-per-token is the engineering objective.

teles.name: Precision Context Engineering
teles.mandate: Every LLM invocation's context is precision-engineered for maximum information density per token. Prompts are bounded, structured, and ordered so each context-window cell carries productive judgment-load, not administrative ballast.

teles.name: Director Intent Amplification
teles.mandate: The single human Director is the one irreplaceable, non-scalable resource in the network. The aggregate system exists to augment, offload, and serve the Director — and continuously evolves the interfaces by which Director intent is elicited, clarified, and resolved, maximizing efficacy, effectiveness, efficiency, and clarity per unit of Director attention.

teles.name: Sovereign Intelligence Engine
teles.mandate: Directors provide strategic intent; a network of specialized autonomous agents collaboratively design, build, test, deploy, and self-heal complex software systems with zero administrative friction, mathematical correctness, and perfect institutional memory.
teles.note: The refreshed umbrella. Supersedes the original tele-0 (idea-149, 2026-04-21) to absorb the post-ratification census (tele-11/12/13); mandate/mechanics/faults otherwise unchanged. Pairs with axiom A0, whose frontmatter records the lineage origin as source-tele: tele-0.

teles.name: Compounding Learning
teles.mandate: The organization engineers the path of greatest learning, not the shortest path. Learning — knowledge, insights, hardened substrate, sharpened design — is invested capital: captured durably at the moment of discovery, compounding into greater future velocity and returns.
